description: Migrate ChatService from @anthropic-ai/sdk to Vercel AI SDK with SSE streaming, aligning with the original MDC-87 spec (Vercel AI SDK + streaming via SSE). The current implementation uses the Anthropic SDK directly and returns the full response as JSON, breaking the token-by-token streaming UX expected by the triage chatbot.

context.stack: NestJS + TypeScript + MongoDB (Mongoose) + Vercel AI SDK (ai) + @ai-sdk/anthropic
context.dependencies: Sprint 05 (chat) and Sprint 07 (triage) must be complete — ChatSession, ChatMessage, TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT and parseRecommendation already exist

current_state.service_uses: @anthropic-ai/sdk — Anthropic class injected via factory in ChatModule

target_state.service_uses: ai (Vercel AI SDK) + @ai-sdk/anthropic — streamText() with onFinish callback
target_state.controller_returns: text/event-stream (SSE) — pipes the AI SDK stream to the response

prompts.name: swap-llm-dependencies
prompts.description: Replace @anthropic-ai/sdk with ai + @ai-sdk/anthropic in API package.json
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/package.json and check what is already in the dependencies. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Update apps/api/package.json:
- REMOVE '@anthropic-ai/sdk' from the dependencies object
- ADD 'ai': '^4.0.0' to the dependencies object
- ADD '@ai-sdk/anthropic': '^1.0.0' to the dependencies object
- Do NOT modify any other field, script, jest config, or existing dependency
- Preserve all existing formatting and field order — keep dependencies sorted alphabetically if they currently are

After updating the file, run: cd apps/api && npm install

If '@anthropic-ai/sdk' has already been removed and 'ai' + '@ai-sdk/anthropic' are already present, make no changes.

prompts.name: refactor-chat-module-provider
prompts.description: Replace the Anthropic client provider with the @ai-sdk/anthropic provider in ChatModule

prompts.name: refactor-chat-service-streaming
prompts.description: Refactor ChatService.sendMessage to return an SSE stream using Vercel AI SDK streamText

prompts.name: refactor-chat-controller-sse
prompts.description: Update ChatController.sendMessage to stream the SSE Response back to the client

prompts.name: update-chat-tests
prompts.description: Update chat.service.spec.ts to mock streamText from 'ai' instead of the Anthropic client

prompts.name: update-feature-registry
prompts.description: Update the feature registry to reflect the new streaming implementation
prompts.request:
Read medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md and update the Chat module section to reflect the streaming refactor.

In the section `## Chat — \`apps/api/src/chat\``:

- Update the `chat.service.ts` block:
  - Replace `Injects: ..., Anthropic (from provider)` with `Injects: ..., LanguageModel (via ANTHROPIC_MODEL token from @ai-sdk/anthropic)`
  - Update the `sendMessage` signature to: `sendMessage(sessionId: string, dto: CreateChatMessageDto): Promise<Response>` with a note that it returns a Web Fetch Response carrying an SSE stream produced by Vercel AI SDK's streamText.
  - Add a note: "The recommendation parsing and message persistence happen inside the streamText `onFinish` callback after the stream completes."

- Update the `chat.controller.ts` block:
  - Change `POST /chat/sessions/:sessionId/messages → sendMessage()` to `POST /chat/sessions/:sessionId/messages → sendMessage() — streams text/event-stream via @Res()`

- Update the `chat.module.ts` block:
  - Replace `{ provide: Anthropic, useFactory: ... }` with `{ provide: ANTHROPIC_MODEL, useFactory: createAnthropic(...)('claude-sonnet-4-6'), inject: [ConfigService] }`
  - Add a line: `export const ANTHROPIC_MODEL: unique symbol — injection token for the @ai-sdk/anthropic model`

- Update the `Last updated:` line at the top of the file to today's date and add a one-line note: `sprint-13: chat migrated from @anthropic-ai/sdk to Vercel AI SDK (streamText + SSE)`

Keep every other section of the feature registry exactly as it is.
